diagrams.title: Interval Compatibility Example
diagrams.description: Shows three intervals on a timeline demonstrating compatible (non-overlapping) and incompatible (overlapping) intervals
diagrams.purpose: Understand which intervals can be selected together - A and C are compatible, A and B overlap, B and C just touch at endpoint which is typically allowed

diagrams.title: DP Decision Tree for WISP
diagrams.description: Shows the binary choice at each interval i in the DP - either include interval i or exclude it
elements: Option 1: Include i → add weight[i] + DP[p(i)]
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the recursive decision making in the DP solution

diagrams.title: Finding p(i) using Binary Search
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how binary search finds the predecessor on a sorted finish times array
elements: Target = start time of interval i
Binary search finds rightmost finish ≤ target
diagrams.purpose: Understand efficient computation of predecessor for each interval
